items.caption: A collection of tree-related illustrations, including a variety of tree types, tree trunks, and tree parts. the trees are depicted in a cartoon-like style with a focus on green foliage and brown trunks. the illustration set includes a full tree with leaves, a tree with a cut section, a tree with a missing branch, a tree with a split trunk, and a tree with a broken branch. the background is plain white, emphasizing the tree illustrations.
